mapper.select: SELECT ps.*, ps.is_anonymous AS anonymous, cp.status AS originStatus FROM post_scrap ps LEFT JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = ps.post_id WHERE ps.id = #{id} AND ps.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_scrap (user_id, post_id, snapshot_title, snapshot_content, snapshot_author_label, snapshot_category, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{snapshotTitle}, #{snapshotContent}, #{snapshotAuthorLabel}, #{snapshotCategory}, #{anonymous})
mapper.update: UPDATE post_scrap SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT ps.*, ps.is_anonymous AS anonymous, cp.status AS originStatus FROM post_scrap ps LEFT JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = ps.post_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} AND ps.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ps.scrapped_at DESC, ps.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_scrap WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
